summary_en: 6,000,000 shares (6.2% S/O) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 at ¥100/share on May 18, 2026 at 08:45 JST. Ceiling of ¥600M. Part of authorized program approved Feb 25 and May 15, 2026 (execution period Feb 26, 2026 – Feb 25, 2027). No shares yet acquired as of May 15, 2026.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares via off-market share purchase transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: MRK Holdings announced on May 15, 2026 that it will execute a specific block purchase of 6,000,000 treasury shares on May 18, 2026 at 08:45 JST via ToSTNeT-3 (off-market share purchase transaction) at ¥100 per share. The transaction size is capped at 6,000,000 shares and a total value of ¥600 million, representing 6.2% of outstanding shares. This block purchase is authorized under a broader board resolution from February 25 and May 15, 2026, which permits acquisition of up to 6 million shares via either open-market purchase or ToSTNeT-3 during the period from February 26, 2026 through February 25, 2027. As of the announcement date, no shares had yet been acquired under the program. Execution is contingent on matching sell orders in the specified trading window.
